gq 0.0.0.9000
  • Reference
    • Getting started with gq

Package index

All functions

gq_mapgl_classes()
Get a MapLibre match expression for a classified layer
gq_mapgl_style()
Translate a registry layer style to mapgl arguments
gq_qgs_extract()
Extract layer styles from a QGIS project file
gq_registry_read()
Read a gq style registry from JSON
gq_tmap_classes()
Get a named list of tmap arguments for each class in a classified layer
gq_tmap_style()
Translate a registry layer style to tmap v4 arguments

Developed by Allan Irvine.
